hero.title: Transform Your Roof Into
hero.description: ToitureVerte is your specialist for green roof installation in Brussels and across Belgium. Extensive, semi-intensive green roofs and roof gardens — we design and install durable, beautiful living roofs.

benefits.title: The Benefits of a Vegetated Roof
benefits.subtitle: A green roof is more than aesthetics — it's a sustainable investment with multiple benefits for your building and the environment.

items.title: Thermal Insulation
items.description: Reduce your energy consumption. A green roof improves building insulation both in summer and winter.

items.title: Water Management
items.description: Retain up to 90% of rainwater, reducing flood risk and relieving drainage systems.

items.title: Urban Biodiversity
items.description: Create a refuge for insects and birds in the urban environment. Actively contribute to nature in the city.

items.title: Property Value
items.description: A vegetated roof increases the value of your property by 5 to 15% and improves its market appeal.

servicesSection.title: Our Green Roof Services
servicesSection.subtitle: From simple extensive roofs to rooftop gardens, ToitureVerte manages every project from A to Z across Belgium.

processSection.title: A Turnkey Project, Step by Step

steps.title: Feasibility Study
steps.description: Analysis of your roof: structure, slope, accessibility, budget.

steps.title: Custom Design
steps.description: Detailed plans, choice of plants and materials tailored to your project.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Installation by our certified teams in Brussels and across Belgium.

steps.title: Follow-up & Maintenance
steps.description: Maintenance contracts and long-term vegetation monitoring.

why.title: Why Choose ToitureVerte?
why.description: Based in Brussels, we operate across Belgium with over 10 years of recognised expertise in green roof installation. Every project is unique, every solution is tailored.

items.title: Certified Expertise
items.description: Teams trained to Belgian and European standards. Members of the green roof federation.

items.title: Tailored Solutions
items.description: Every roof is unique. We adapt our solution to the structure, budget and your vision.

items.title: Complete Service
items.description: From design to maintenance, ToitureVerte provides full project support.

items.title: Ecological Commitment
items.description: Local and sustainable materials, plants adapted to the Belgian climate, positive carbon footprint.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know About Green Roofs

items.q: What is an extensive green roof?
items.a: An extensive green roof is the lightest type of roof greening (50 to 150 kg/m²). It consists of a substrate layer of 5 to 15 cm and hardy plants such as sedums. It requires minimal maintenance and is suitable for most flat roofs in Belgium.

items.q: What does a green roof cost in Belgium?
items.a: The cost varies by type: between €40 and €80/m² for extensive, €80 to €150/m² for semi-intensive, and €150 to €300/m² for intensive. These prices include supply and installation. We offer a free personalised quote.

items.q: Can my roof support a green roof?
items.a: The vast majority of flat roofs can accommodate a green roof. Our experts conduct a free feasibility study to assess the load-bearing capacity of your structure, the slope and the condition of existing waterproofing.

items.q: Are there grants for green roofs in Belgium?
items.a: Yes! The Brussels Capital Region offers grants up to €50,000 (€30/m² for individuals). Wallonia and Flanders also offer cumulative regional and municipal subsidies. VAT can be reduced to 6% and green loans are available.
Installation typically takes 1 to 5 days depending on the area. For large commercial or industrial projects, the timeframe may be longer. We plan works to minimise disruption.

items.q: Do you work across all of Belgium?
items.a: Yes, ToitureVerte operates across Belgium: Brussels, Wallonia (Liège, Namur, Charleroi, Mons...) and Flanders (Antwerp, Ghent, Bruges, Leuven...). We travel at no extra charge within 100 km of Brussels.
